name: image-reveal
title: ImageReveal
description: An image that enters with one of Onda's signature motion fingerprints — blur falloff, fade, or subtle scale. Wraps Remotion's `` with `SPRING_SMOOTH` motion, no overshoot. Fills the canvas by default; pass `placement` to position as a sub-canvas element.
pickWhen: any still image with intent — photo, screenshot, logo lockup. Use `ken-burns` when the image should drift cinematically.
